title: Avoid Redefining Standard Functional Interfaces
description: Redefining standard functional interfaces can lead to confusion and unnecessary complexity. Use existing functional interfaces instead.
recommendation: Use existing functional interfaces instead of redefining them.
impact: Redefining standard functional interfaces can lead to confusion and maintenance issues.

noncompliant: ExtendedBooleanSupplier { boolean get(); default boolean isFalse() { return !get(); } }
compliant: ExtendedBooleanSupplier extends BooleanSupplier { default boolean isFalse() { return !getAsBoolean(); } }

checks.message: Use existing functional interfaces instead of redefining them.
